Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Government_Resource.asp

# Government Contracting Too-Early Route

## Reusable BOSS response pattern
Acknowledge the government-contracting goal, but keep early-stage clients focused on concept validation, operations, insurance, pricing, delivery capacity, and proof of performance. Use Government Jumpstation for education. Route to APEX only when the business meets readiness/eligibility conditions.

## Handoff fields to capture
- Stage
- Business idea/current business
- Location ZIP/county
- Primary decision
- What has been done
- Revenue/customer evidence
- Documents available
- Special eligibility or language preference
- Recommended resource and why
